revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a high-resolution 16-bit-plus pixel-art animated sprite sheet, exact canvas size 1024x512 px. Solid #FF00FF chroma-key background fills every empty pixel; no gradients, no transparency, no shadows outside the character.

Use the attached reference image as the exact identity and style reference for the character Mito. Match the same proportions, head-to-body ratio, sturdy grounded build, body width, limb thickness, palette, dark one-pixel outline style, pixel density, and cheerful mythical-Japan RPG look. Treat this as re-posing the referenced character, not redesigning him.

Sheet layout: 2 rows x 4 columns, 8 equal cells, each cell 256x256 px. Do not draw grid lines, borders, frame numbers, labels, UI, text, logos, or watermarks. Exactly one character per cell. Keep the same scale, same head size, same total standing height, same body width, and same centered placement in every cell. Leave clear solid magenta margin around the figure inside each cell. No detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, dust specks, seam slivers, or leftover effects.

Animation: eight-frame walk cycle for one direction only, facing UP in top-down 3/4 back view. The viewer sees the back of the head, tiny low ponytail at the nape with vermilion braided cord, the back of the indigo haori, sash knot, and back/side of the sheathed short ritual sword at the left hip. No face visible. The sword remains sheathed at the hip in every frame and never crosses a cell boundary.

Frame order: TOP row left to right = frames 1-4. BOTTOM row left to right = frames 5-8.
Frame 1: CONTACT A, Mito's LEFT foot planted forward, right foot back, arms counter-swing.
Frame 2: weight drop, body 2-3 px lower, legs visibly changed from frame 1.
Frame 3: PASSING, feet together under body, body centered.
Frame 4: push-off, body 2-3 px higher, legs visibly changed from frame 3.
Frame 5: CONTACT B, Mito's RIGHT foot planted forward, mirror step of frame 1, arms opposite.
Frame 6: weight drop, body 2-3 px lower, legs visibly changed from frame 5.
Frame 7: PASSING, feet together under body.
Frame 8: push-off, body 2-3 px higher, loops evenly back to frame 1.

Walk realism requirements: feet stay on a consistent ground line in every cell, planted foot flat and grounded under body weight, no floating, no tip-toeing, no sliding. Leg silhouettes visibly differ between consecutive frames. The leading foot alternates correctly between frame 1 and frame 5. Arms swing opposite the legs and change pose together with the legs in every frame. Show lifted soles clearly enough for the back view. Haori back panel, sash knot, tassel, ponytail cord, and sleeve knots sway subtly with each step while preserving identity and scale.

Character details to preserve: androgynous 15-year-old wanderer, ink-black short hair, tiny low ponytail, vermilion braided-cord hair ornament, white tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads visible where the back 3/4 angle allows, sheathed short ritual sword in a WHITE scabbard wrapped with thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers. Bright fantasy-Japanese traveler, not samurai, not ninja.

Style constraints: crisp low-resolution pixel clusters rendered at high resolution, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source, bright cheerful colors. The character fills most of the cell height with a small margin, about 2.4 heads tall, sturdy chest, thick limbs, broad stable stance, not slim, not lanky, not taller than the reference.

Avoid entirely: Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses; samurai armor; kabuto helmet; ninja outfit; two-sword daisho; gun; modern objects; horror mood; dark gloomy palette; bird or companion creature; letter emblems; modern text, watermark, or UI.
